description: Edge reveal systematic validation -- test all geometry+camera combinations for edge reveals with the oversizing system applied. Verify that no camera path reveals the edge of any plane during its full motion range. Requires concrete geometry (OBJ-018) and camera (OBJ-027) implementations plus the oversizing system (OBJ-040) and compatibility rules (OBJ-041). Addresses TC-03 (perspective projection convincing).
notes: Tier 5 tuning. High priority. Fixed deps per Round 2 Issue 3 to include concrete implementations. Spec defines a systematic edge-reveal validation harness (runEdgeRevealHarness) with dual validation: OBJ-040 sampling (authoritative for facing-camera planes) + OBJ-041 analytical (authoritative for rotated planes). Produces structured reports with actionable size adjustments and visual review checklists for Director Agent workflow. Also includes generateTestManifest for rendering test clips with solid-color data URI images.
